search_document:
User Request: Inventory dashboard.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Inventory Levels by Category
Type: chart
Description: Current inventory levels across different product categories
Title: Top Products by Sales
Type: table
Description: Products with the highest sales volume
Title: Total Stock Value
Type: kpi
Description: Total value of all products in stock
Title: Low Stock Alerts
Type: list
Description: Products that are below the reorder level
Title: Monthly Inventory Turnover
Type: chart
Description: Rate at which inventory is sold and replaced over the month

sql_queries.title: Inventory Levels by Category
sql_queries.description: Current inventory levels across different product categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, SUM(p.UnitsInStock) AS TotalUnitsInStock FROM Products p JOIN Categories c ON p.CategoryID = c.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Top Products by Sales
sql_queries.description: Products with the highest sales volume
sql_queries.sql: SELECT p.ProductName, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalQuantitySold FROM 'Order Details' od JOIN Products p ON od.ProductID = p.ProductID GROUP BY p.ProductName ORDER BY TotalQuantitySold DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Total Stock Value
sql_queries.description: Total value of all products in stock
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(p.UnitsInStock * p.UnitPrice) AS TotalStockValue FROM Products p

sql_queries.title: Low Stock Alerts
sql_queries.description: Products that are below the reorder level
sql_queries.sql: SELECT ProductName, UnitsInStock, ReorderLevel FROM Products WHERE UnitsInStock < ReorderLevel

sql_queries.title: Monthly Inventory Turnover
sql_queries.description: Rate at which inventory is sold and replaced over the month
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS Month, SUM(od.Quantity) AS TotalUnitsSold FROM Orders o JOIN 'Order Details' od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY Month ORDER BY Month
